title: porlieria microphylla
intro: Porlieria microphylla, also known as Yerba de Toro, is a shrub native to the Andean region, particularly in Peru, Bolivia, and Ecuador. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Porlieria microphylla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Porlieria microphylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues.
